title: Escalate High-Risk Referrals
summary: Analyze referral text and urgency markers, then reprioritize high-risk cases for timely review.
problem_statement: Referral queues mix urgent and routine cases, delaying care for patients with high-risk signals.

inputs.name: referral_text
inputs.description: Free-text referral reason and supporting context.

inputs.name: queue_context
inputs.description: Current queue, due date, and service line metadata.

rule_sets.summary: If high-risk language or escalation markers are present, route to higher queue priority.

actions.label: Create triage review item
actions.description: Queue the referral for rapid human review.

examples: This referral mentions rapid worsening symptoms and needs triage.
Please review whether this referral should move into the urgent triage lane today.
